summary: Comprehensive testing of P0 Partner Flow: Lead (with partner) → Customer (inherits partner) → Inspection (has report_template_id, inspection_template_id, report_style). All 7 features tested and verified working. Backend APIs (13/14 tests passed, 1 skipped) and Frontend UI (all features functional).
critical_code_review_comments: All P0 Partner Flow features implemented correctly
Leads page has Partner/Client dropdown with B2C Default, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank options
Helper text 'Leave empty for default B2C customer' is displayed correctly
Backend POST /api/leads creates lead with default B2C partner_id if not specified
GET /api/inspections/{id}/questionnaire returns questions based on inspection_template_id
GET /api/inspections/{id}/report-config returns report style and template info
Leads list shows partner badges (e.g., 'HDFC Bank') next to city for non-B2C leads
Partners tab shows all 3 partners: B2C Default, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank
seed_data_creation: Test leads created with HDFC Bank partner during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Partner Flow fully tested. Complete flow: 1) Lead created with partner_id (default B2C), 2) Payment webhook creates Customer with partner_id from lead, 3) Inspection created with report_template_id, inspection_template_id, report_style from the partner's default report template. New APIs tested: GET /api/inspections/{id}/questionnaire, GET /api/inspections/{id}/report-config. Partners available: B2C Default (active), HDFC Bank (active), ICICI Bank (inactive).

features_tested.Leads_Partner_Dropdown: PASS - Add Lead modal has 'Partner/Client' dropdown with partners list
features_tested.Leads_Partner_Options: PASS - Partner dropdown shows B2C Default, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank options
features_tested.Leads_Helper_Text: PASS - Helper text shows 'Leave empty for default B2C customer'
features_tested.Backend_Default_B2C_Partner: PASS - POST /api/leads creates lead with default B2C partner_id if not specified
features_tested.Backend_Questionnaire_API: PASS - GET /api/inspections/{id}/questionnaire returns questions based on inspection_template_id
features_tested.Backend_Report_Config_API: PASS - GET /api/inspections/{id}/report-config returns report style and template info
features_tested.Leads_Partner_Badge: PASS - Leads list shows partner badge (e.g., 'HDFC Bank') next to city for non-B2C leads

screenshots_taken: 02_leads_page.png - Leads page with partner badges visible
03_lead_modal.png - Add Lead modal with Partner/Client dropdown
04_partner_dropdown.png - Partner dropdown showing B2C Default and HDFC Bank options
06_partners_tab.png - Services > Partners tab showing all 3 partners
07_leads_with_partner_badges.png - Leads list with HDFC Bank badges
note_on_customers_page: Customers page does not show partner badges because all existing customers are B2C Default. The partner badge only shows for non-B2C customers as per the code: customer.partner_name && customer.partner_name !== 'B2C Default'
